integration_validation_v2.gap: MT-192 requires Flight Recorder events for visual capture/validation/recovery. No such FR events exist. Cited mt_192_* tests prove state-replay determinism/gap-detection (WP-KERNEL-004), emitting FR-EVT-REPLAY-* events — not visual/validation/recovery events.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/session_checkpoint_tests.rs:1499-1506 (asserts FR-EVT-REPLAY-STARTED/PROGRESS/COMPLETED — replay, not visual/validation/recovery); src/atelier/state_probe.rs:1044 (VISUAL_EVIDENCE matrix is MT-175, not an MT-192 FR-event surface)

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-192 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Visual Validation And Recovery Events -- Define Flight Recorder events for visual capture
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Flight Recorder Visual Validation And Recovery Events
scope.summary: MT-192 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Flight Recorder Visual Validation And Recovery Events -- Define Flight Recorder events for visual capture, validation, recovery only.
